text: For too long, accounting has been toggling tabs, chasing receipts, and reconciling thousands
of rows by hand. Legacy systems breed talent under busy work. Offshore workflows introduce
lag, risk, and noise. We accept it slow. We call it normal. But it's time to sever that cycle.
With artifact AI, reconciliation runs itself. Inside is instant, and accountants become advisors again.
What if your accounting software wasn't a tool? What if it was a collaborative part of your team?
Meet artifact, your accounting agent. Month end shouldn't be a fire drill. One agent that collects,
matches, reconciles, books, and exports. I add a client, continue with zero or slow books,
approve secure access, and we're live. No CSVs, the agent syncs the charts, vendors, opening
balances, and lays out a first run plan. Missing docs, artifact notices, and acts. Sends a smart
reminder listing the exact transactions we need, and tracked responses in real time. Web uploads
and mobile scans included. Every receipt and invoice is auto matched to the right transaction.
Vendor, date, amount, even tax. High confidence items attach automatically. The rest land in a
clean exceptions queue. With feeds connected, the agent auto reconciles clearing matches in seconds
and flagging true breaks with reasons. So you review exceptions, not everything.
It then proposes journals and shows its work. Each suggestion comes with reasoning and confidence,
so reviewers move fast. Pre-payments are scheduled, fixed assets, and policy paths keeps you aligned
across UKGAP, USGAP, and IFRS. Disagree with the suggestion? Edit it once, tell us why, and choose
where to learn. Client level for this business, industry specific for similar clients, or firm
level for everyone. Next time, the agent applies it automatically, with an audit trail and a review
gate for firm wide changes. When you're ready, it's one click. The export button only shows
what's connected. Zero or slow books, so journals land exactly where they belong. Plan, execute,
audit trail. Stop chasing, start closing, join the wait list.
